title: Eutrema botschantzevii
taxonomy: Eutrema botschantzevii is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It is closely related to other Eutrema species, which are commonly found in mountainous regions of Asia. The Eutrema genus is part of the larger Brassicaceae family, which includes numerous species of flowering plants, such as broccoli and cabbage. The classification of Eutrema botschantzevii is based on its botanical characteristics, including its leaf structure and flower morphology. Further research may be necessary to confirm the exact classification of this species within the Brassicaceae family.
